{{Infobox event
| name = Ruler Trial
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] is the most difficult of the three [[Blackflame Trials]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are attempting the [[Ruler Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] involves a tablet.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ruler Trial]] contains ninety-nine dummies.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
